vela_intro.speaker: Vela
lines: The old canal reflection is still here, under the banana pavement.
Prototype echoes make useful test subjects, but Banana-burbs makes even my reflection smile too long.
If Shrububu finds KFC here, check it for mayoral stamps.

vela_after_battle.speaker: Vela
lines: The reflection clears.
Banana-burbs is louder than the canal ever was.
SRMT's shadow hates honest noise, so keep making it.

monkey_loop.speaker: Happy Monkey
lines: Today is perfect. Yesterday was perfect. Tomorrow has already agreed.
Shrububu is searching for KFC? That sounds unnecessary because we are happy.
We love our identical banana houses. We love not asking why the mayor's smile is painted on the moon.

lab_165_files.speaker: Lab Recorder
lines: 165-files recovered. Mayor Deepak Reddy maintains town-wide joy compliance.
Nitin is assigned to keep the records invisible and the floors aggressively clean.
SRMT pressure index rising. Banana-burbs morale spell marked 'protective' by the mayor and 'useful' by the throne.
Shrububu should not be reading this, which is why Shrububu absolutely is.

nitin_intro.speaker: Nitin
lines: Step away from the 165-files.
I have mopped this lab for years and I will mop the truth off your shoes.
The mayor likes clean floors, cleaner memories, and no KFC crumbs in evidence storage.

nitin_defeat.speaker: Nitin
lines: The mop... has failed the office.
Take the 165-files, but understand this: Deepak thinks fear is what SRMT left us with.
Also wipe your shoes. I still have standards.

popcorn_reveal.speaker: Shrububu
lines: Words failed. Logic failed. Fine.
Shrububu opens the backup KFC popcorn box.
One emergency popcorn box. No speeches. Eat.
The monkeys taste something happier than the spell and remember how to be angry.

deepak_intro.speaker: Deepak Reddy
lines: You broke the rhythm of Banana-burbs with fried chicken crumbs.
I am Deepak Reddy, mayor, monkey king, and keeper of the smile.
If the outside world wants cruelty, I choose joy by force. If SRMT wants obedience, I give him a town too happy to notice.

deepak_defeat.speaker: Deepak Reddy
lines: I did not serve SRMT because I loved him.
I kept them happy because the outside world was too cruel to monkeys who had only learned joy.
Take the banana gun, Shrububu. Maybe freedom can survive without a spell, and maybe KFC can be more than bait.

monkey_mailman.speaker: Monkey Mailman
lines: I deliver the same postcard to the same house every morning.
It says, 'Great job being happy,' and the stamp has Deepak's face.
When I smelled KFC popcorn, I remembered I hate postcards.

monkey_lawnkeeper.speaker: Monkey Lawnkeeper
lines: All lawns are trimmed to identical joy height.
One blade grew crooked last week. Nitin arrived with a mop and a warning.
SRMT's rain never reaches this suburb, which should have been our first clue.

monkey_accountant.speaker: Monkey Accountant
lines: The mayor's happiness budget is enormous.
The banana budget is also enormous.
The line for 'emergency fried chicken exposure' was blank until you arrived.

monkey_child.speaker: Monkey Child
lines: My toy train only goes in circles, but everyone claps like it discovered a continent.
Do trains go to KFC?
If they do, can they also go away from SRMT?

monkey_radio_host.speaker: Monkey Radio Host
lines: This is Banana-burbs radio, finally broadcasting unscheduled emotions.
Today's weather: confused, banana-scented, and free.
Shrububu, if you hear this, the monkey army still believes the KFC popcorn was a holy event.

clue_smile_meter.speaker: Smile Meter
lines: The lab meter records every smile in Banana-burbs and sounds an alarm when one becomes complicated.
The alarm log spikes whenever SRMT is mentioned.

clue_mayor_poster.speaker: Mayor Poster
lines: Deepak's poster reads: 'Happiness is safety. Safety is obedience. Obedience is optional, technically.'
Someone drew a KFC bucket over his crown and then apologized to the poster.

clue_lab_banana_gun_case.speaker: Banana Gun Case
lines: The empty case says the banana gun is issued only during civic awakening.
A note below it says: 'Do not point at mayor unless the spell breaks first.'

banana_post_clear_army.speaker: Monkey Army
lines: The monkeys gather with banana guns, lunch boxes, and new opinions.
They do not know how to fight SRMT yet, but they know they were lied to.

banana_post_clear_mayor_office.speaker: Mayor Office
lines: Deepak's office is quiet after the fight.
On his desk: one apology, one banana peel, and a map pointing toward Berry Barks where no KFC is promised honestly.
